headline: Barclays Upgrades Halliburton to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $55
summary: Barclays  analyst David Anderson   upgrades Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $37 to $55.

raw.headline: Barclays Upgrades Halliburton to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $55
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst David Anderson   upgrades Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $37 to $55.

headline: 'We’ll just tolerate the headlines': Why this fund manager remains risk-on despite the Iran conflict
summary: George Boubouras of K2 Asset Management says markets are largely looking past the Iran conflict and that investors are staying firmly on risk-on mode as attention shifts to the medium-term economic outlook. He remains overweight U.S. and other developed market equities, arguing that corporate resilience can withstand the near-term inflation shock from higher oil prices.
